result: If I could change the world in one way, I'd make empathy a fundamental part of every education system from the ground up—teaching it not just as a skill, but as a reflex. It might ripple out to reduce conflicts, foster innovation through understanding, and make humanity a bit less prone to self-sabotage. What about you?
